title: cynoglossum officinale var. virens
intro: Cynoglossum officinale var. virens, also known as the Chinese forked tongue or Chinese hound's tongue, is a variety of the Cynoglossum officinale plant, a species of flowering plant in the borage family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cynoglossum officinale var. virens include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
